abilities.name: First to Speak
abilities.text: If this model has already activated this turn, enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

abilities.name: "Is That Head Talking?!?"
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model within 6" with an Abandoned token resolves a non-Interact, non-Walk action, this model may move it up to 2".

actions.name: Pram Ram
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it receives a (fortitude).

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

actions.name: Deadly Banter
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives an additional raise if the target has an Abandoned token.
actions.effects: The target gains a Craven token. If this attack did not receive a raise, this model may not declare this action again this activation.

triggers.name: Pulled Into the Story
triggers.text: Make a number of Scheme markers within 1" of the target up to the number of raises this attack received.

triggers.name: Foiled Plans
triggers.text: Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker from anywhere in play. If it cannot, it is dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Misunderstood Monster
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or gain an Abandoned token.

actions.name: Rambling Man
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5" in any direction, ignoring models. Enemy models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Distracted token.
